subject: CHEM
course_description: Selected major plays from the histories, comedies, tragedies, and romances. May be repeated for credit when topic varies.
course_notes: (This course will examine Shakespeare's plays on page and stage. We will be watching performances, talking with actors and directors, when possible, and will discuss both historic and modern perspectives of the plays. We will also take advantage of the wide range of fascinating podcasts and other materials devoted to Shakespearean topics. Regular writing assignments and active involvement in class discussions will be required. You will be able to use any copies of Shakespeare's texts (library encouraged), so long as they are in Shakespeare's language and include Act, Scene, and Line numbers. The course welcomes students from all disciplines and encourages them to find connections between their academic and personal interests and this drama.)
